## Data Description

*[Person A]* — Describe your dataset here.

```{python}
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../src')
from data_loader import load_data

df = load_data()
df.head()
```

## Data Cleaning

```{python}
from data_loader import clean_data

df_clean = clean_data(df)
print(f"Shape after cleaning: {df_clean.shape}")
```
